hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for PATTERN in "rm -rf" "git push --force" "git push -f" "git reset --hard" "drop table" "DROP TABLE" "truncate" "TRUNCATE" "git checkout main" "git checkout dev" "--force-with-lease"; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qi "$PATTERN"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected: $PATTERN" >&2; exit 1; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for PATTERN in "AKIA" "sk-" "sk_live" "sk_test" "ghp_" "gho_" "password=" "PASSWORD=" "api_key=" "API_KEY=" "secret=" "SECRET=" "token=" "TOKEN=" "private_key"; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$PATTERN"; then echo "BLOCKED: Potential secret detected: $PATTERN" >&2; exit 1; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for PATTERN in "AKIA" "sk-" "sk_live" "sk_test" "ghp_" "gho_" "password=" "PASSWORD=" "api_key=" "API_KEY=" "secret=" "SECRET=" "token=" "TOKEN=" "private_key"; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$PATTERN"; then echo "BLOCKED: Potential secret detected: $PATTERN" >&2; exit 1; fi; done; exit 0'
